info.title: Core API Service
info.description: Customers, Requirements, Journeys, Automations, Dashboard, Client Pipeline

post.description: Send a Purchase Order request email to the client for a requirement.
Email the client requesting a budget increase for a requirement.
Generate an invoice from the PO linked to a requirement via trainer-service.

get.description: Quick KPI numbers for the top-of-page dashboard cards.
Time-series analytics for the dashboard charts.

Aggregate view of requirements with their shortlist/trainer pipeline info.
Mirrors the monolith's GET /client-pipeline endpoint.
